items.name: limited edition maple scalloped anniversary tray
items.displayName: limited edition maple scalloped anniversary tray
items.description: celebrate 20 years of nora fleming with our exclusive, limited-edition “maple scalloped anniversary tray.” handcrafted by our partners at JK Adams, this tray is a true work of art, designed to be the centerpiece of your gatherings. at 20” x 10” x 1.25”, and with decorative scalloped edging and a premium maple finish, it’s perfect for making any holiday or special occasion memorable. sizing: 20" x 10" x 1.25" care & use: do not allow wood to soak in water wash quickly in warm soapy water and dry immediately do not put wood in dishwasher or microwave avoid extreme temperatures oil frequently wit

items.name: maple bread board
items.description: made by hand for nora fleming by J.K. Adams designed specially to hold any nora fleming mini, these stylish serving boards feature the signature ivory stoneware accent and pinstripes design. elevate any gathering with the enduring quality of J.K. Adams and nora fleming! sizing: 18" x 8" care & use: do not allow wood to soak in water wash quickly in warm soapy water and dry immediately do not put wood in dishwasher or microwave avoid extreme temperatures oil frequently with mineral oil

items.name: maple cheese board
items.description: made in vermont by the outstanding craftspeople at J.K. Adams, our maple cheese board includes a carved groove around the border. this detail is perfect for keeping cheeses, accompaniments, and little bites neatly in place. sizing: 8" x 8" care & use: do not allow wood to soak in water wash quickly in warm soapy water and dry immediately do not put wood in dishwasher or microwave avoid extreme temperatures oil frequently with mineral oil

items.name: melamine shallow bowl
items.description: level up your entertaining with our new melamine shallow bowl and risers! select the melamine bowl (bowl may also be used separately) align the bowl screw hole to the screw post on the low or high riser rotate the bowl until it's securely affixed and add your favorite mini! *risers work with the melamine round platter, shallow bowl and divided dish. sizing: 14.5" D x 3"H care & use: BPA free & food safe dishwasher safe not microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes bread tray
items.description: not just for bread...this tray is a modern and elegant size! we always suggest starting off a new collector with this base that can fit any occasion! sizing: 15" x 7 1/2" care & use: dishwasher & microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes cracker tray
items.description: crackers get the spotlight on the table when it comes to this base piece! make your presentation full of variety with our cracker tray! sizing: 12" x 3" care & use: dishwasher & microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes garnish dish
items.description: triple the options with this must-have garnish dish! sizing: 15 1/4" x 6. 1/2" x 2" care & use: dishwasher & microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes melamine divided dish
items.description: this multi-functional dish offers a variety of possibilities for serving your favorite snacks, dips, and fruits. the divided compartments allow you to showcase treats, making it easy for guests to indulge in a diverse selection. from crunchy veggies with a zesty dip to a colorful array of fresh fruits, the possibilities are endless. level up your entertaining with our melamine divided dish and risers! select the melamine divided dish (divided dish may also be used separately) align the divided dish screw hole to the screw post on the low or high riser rotate the divided dish until it's securel

items.name: pinstripes melamine round platter
items.description: our melamine round platter is perfect for serving. level up your entertaining by adding the platter to our low and high risers! 1. select the melamine round platter (platter may also be used separately) 2. align the round platter screw hole to the screw post on the low or high riser 3. rotate the platter until it's securely affixed and add your favorite mini! *risers work with the melamine round platter, divided dish and shallow bowl. sizing: 14 1/2" diameter x 1" care & use: BPA free & food safe dishwasher safe not microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes melamine tray
items.description: serve your favorite people with this melamine tray! perfect for a hostess who entertains from room to room! sizing: 19" x 12" x 2 1/2" care & use: BPA free & food safe dishwasher safe not microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes message board
items.description: this versatile message board seamlessly blends style and functionality, featuring a chic design that effortlessly complements any space. crafted with precision, it serves as a decorative accent, a practical message center, a cookbook stand, and an iPad holder, allowing you to personalize your space easily. elevate your home organization and aesthetic with the nora fleming message board – where sophistication meets convenience. sizing: 6 x 6 1/2" x 8 1/2" *pen not included* care & use: dishwasher & microwave safe

items.name: bestie bird
items.description: The “bestie birds” minis are sold individually, each featuring a dove perched on a branch—a symbol of friendship and togetherness. While each bird stands beautifully on its own, they’re designed with connection in mind. We encourage you to buy one for yourself and one for a friend, sharing a meaningful reminder of the special bonds in your life. Celebrate friendship and unity with a gift that’s as thoughtful as it is a-nora-ble.

items.name: catch some fun
items.description: one, two, three strikes, you're out! the perfect mini to *throw* on any platter all baseball season long! hand wash only

items.name: Oklahoma University helmet
items.description: an official licensed Oklahoma University helmet mini! tailgate in style with this sporty addition to the nora fleming collection - go sooners! hand wash only

items.name: shuck yeah!
items.description: this one’s for the dreamers and the doers. it’s for the ones who find beauty in the unexpected and strength in the struggle. “shuck yeah!” was inspired by the oyster’s quiet lesson: that with a little patience, something remarkable can grow from a grain of grit. this hand-painted oyster mini, complete with its tiny pearl, symbolizes resilience, transformation, and grace. whether it’s displayed at a seaside gathering or a simple family dinner, it’s a reminder that life’s treasures often come from within. hand wash only

items.name: tote-ally cute!
items.description: sometimes the best treasures aren’t found online. they’re discovered in your favorite local shop, tucked between friendly smiles and the joy of shopping small. “tote-ally cute!” is part of our “back to brick” initiative, available exclusively in brick-and-mortar stores and not online as a celebration of community and connection. inspired by carefree summer afternoons with fresh hydrangeas in hand, a good book, and your favorite pair of sunglasses, this hand-painted mini captures the beauty of slowing down and savoring the simple moments. a canvas tote overflowing with everyday essentials, it’s

items.name: 9 piece black keepsake box
items.description: keep your minis organized & ready for any occasion! holds 9 minis! sizing: 10 3/4" x 8 3/4" x 3" keepsake box details: sleek magnetic closure durable acrylic front

items.name: celebration circle
items.description: introducing the celebration circle, a beautifully versatile everyday dinner plate designed to make every moment feel special. perfect as an individual plate or a small serving platter, its elegant simplicity lets the mini (and the memories) shine. material: stoneware sizing: 11.5" x 11" x 1" care & use: dishwasher & microwave safe

items.name: clearly a-nora-ble scalloped acrylic frame
items.description: life is made up of mini moments—the ones that make us smile, laugh, and hold each other a little closer. our scalloped acrylic frame is the perfect home for your most a-nora-ble memories. designed to fit 4"x6" or 5"x7" photos seamlessly, it’s also ideal for showcasing an inspiring quote, a menu, a memorable sign, or a meaningful reminder. every day is worth celebrating. care instructions: don’t forget to remove the protective film! clean gently: wipe down with a soft, non-abrasive microfiber cloth. avoid harsh chemicals: glass cleaners, ammonia, or other strong solvents can damage or cloud the

items.name: CreatedBy bluebird of happiness earrings
items.description: our silk earrings are lightweight (you'll forget that you're wearing earrings - except for all of the compliments you'll receive)! each design is drawn by hand or hand-painted and digitally printed onto luxurious 100% silk. ORIGINAL ART by Nora herself -- hand-drawn in her chicago, il studio. each design features nora's signature. collab with CreatedBY

items.name: CreatedBy bluebird of happiness hair + wrist wrap
items.displayName: CreatedBy bluebird of happiness hair + wrist wrap
items.description: whether you tie in your hair, around your wrist, or on your handbag, The Donna Hair + Wrist Wrap is a love note to all of the women in this world who make bold choices and lead with authenticity and kindness. each design is drawn by hand or hand-painted and digitally printed onto luxurious 100% silk. ORIGINAL ART by nora herself -- hand-drawn in her chicago, il studio. each design features nora's signature. collab with CreatedBY

items.name: CreatedBy bluebird of happiness scarf
items.description: whether you wear, frame, hang or tie this bandana scarf - each piece of original art was created to send good vibes out into the world. each design is drawn by hand or hand-painted and digitally printed onto a luxurious cotton fabric. ORIGINAL ART by nora herself -- hand-drawn in her chicago, il studio. each design features nora's signature. collab with CreatedBY

items.name: CreatedBy pumpkin spice hair + wrist wrap

items.description: whether you tie in your hair, around your wrist, or on your handbag, The Donna Hair + Wrist Wrap is a love note to all of the women in this world who make bold choices and lead with authenticity and kindness. each design is drawn by hand or hand-painted and digitally printed onto luxurious 100% silk. items.name: El Fuego Que Nos Unio round bird tassel
items.displayName: El Fuego Que Nos Unio round bird tassel
items.description: add this limited edition tassel to elevate your work bag, your everyday bag, your door knob, or wherever you may see fit! we are so happy to collab with one of our fabulous finds at atlanta market 2022! El Fuego Que Nos Unio is a group of women who came together after Volcan de Fuego wiped their town out. this group decided to use this time while sheltering to learn how to hand-embroider pom-poms and later grew to what we now know as El Fuego Que Nos Unio! only sold on norafleming.com.

items.name: especially for you gift box green
items.displayName: especially for you gift box green
items.description: nora fleming "especially for you" gift boxes are the perfect way to present a special mini to a special someone! each box has a designated spot to insert the mini upright—just like our bases! there’s also a space to write a personal note to share why you chose this mini just for them. think of the "especially for you" gift box as a unique nora fleming greeting card, combining a thoughtful message with the joy of a mini keepsake! the gift box arrives flat and ready for assembly. mini not included.

items.name: gift card
items.description: whether it’s a birthday, holiday, or just because, our digital gift card makes celebrating life’s little moments even easier. your loved ones can pick their favorite bases and minis to style their occasions their way. delivered straight to their inbox, this gift card is simple, thoughtful, and always the perfect gift.

items.name: maple cracker round
items.description: made in Vermont by the outstanding craftsmen at J.K. Adams, our maple cracker round board is the perfect addition to any of our maple base pieces. make a spread of fruits, nuts, cheeses, and add this cracker round board to finish the look. sizing: 8" diameter care & use: do not allow wood to soak in water wash quickly in warm soapy water and dry immediately do not put wood in dishwasher or microwave avoid extreme temperatures oil frequently with mineral oil

items.name: nf x ParkIt
items.description: backyard barbecues, picnics in the park, sporting events, a day at the beach, bonding over the bonfire...one chair, countless memories! easy, light, backpack cooler chairs in the signature nf pattern will have you lookin’ hot while keeping your goodies chill! built to last with a durable cooler, optimal comfort and elegant style - don’t sit out on this launch! chair dimensions are: Total Height: 32" Seat Height: 16" Backrest Height: 21" Total Width: 22.5" Seating Area Width: 20.5" Seating depth: 16" 350lb weight capacity

items.name: oval baker pinstripes
items.description: one dish, you know the rules! our baker is perfect from starting your recipe to placing it on your table! it is the one-pot-stop for all of your special gatherings! sizing: 15" x 8 3/4" x 2" deep care & use: dishwasher, oven up to 400 degrees, & microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes double dipper
items.description: double the fun with our double dippers! these connected bowls are perfect for serving sweet and savory treats, two dips, or your favorite snack combos. sizing: 9.5" x 4.25" x 2" care & use: dishwasher & microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes large canister
items.description: large glass jar in our canister collection! perfect for pens, pasta, and your favorite treats! canister is glass with a melamine lid. sizing: 3.5" dia. x 6" high care & use: dishwasher and microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes medium canister
items.description: the middle size of our canister collection! can't decide on what size to buy? meet us in the middle! canister is glass with a melamine lid. sizing: 3.5" dia. x 4 1/2" high care & use: dishwasher and microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes melamine chip and dip
items.description: our a-nora-ble chip and dip platter is made of high-quality melamine, making it durable and convenient for outdoor use. its functional design makes it easy for small dip containers to fit perfectly into the platter, mess-free! *this melamine piece fits with our band together by nora fleming colorful bands! sizing: 14 1/2" diameter x 1 1/2" care & use: BPA free & food safe dishwasher safe not microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes melamine guest towel holder
items.description: be our guest! our melamine holder adds an elegant touch to your powder room! sizing: 5" x 10 1/4" x 1 1/2" care & use: BPA free & food safe dishwasher safe not microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes melamine high riser
items.description: level up your entertaining with our melamine risers! 1. select the melamine round platter or shallow bowl (bases may also be used separately) 2. align the round platter or shallow bowl screw hole to the screw post on the low or high riser 3. rotate the base until it's securely affixed and add your favorite mini! *risers work with the melamine round platter, shallow bowl and divided dish. sizing: 7" high care & use: BPA free & food safe dishwasher safe not microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes melamine low riser
items.description: level up your entertaining with our melamine risers! 1. select the melamine round platter or shallow bowl (bases may also be used separately) 2. align the round platter or shallow bowl screw hole to the screw post on the low or high riser 3. rotate the base until it's securely affixed and add your favorite mini! *risers work with the melamine round platter, shallow bowl and divided dish. sizing: 4" high care & use: BPA free & food safe dishwasher safe not microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes melamine paper towel holder
items.description: clean up is a breeze with this nora fleming pinstripe melamine paper towel holder! you'll always have your towels on hand with a cute mini on display! sizing: 9" x 7.5" x 13.5" care & use: BPA free & food safe dishwasher safe not microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes napkin and candy holder
items.description: a nora fleming favorite for its versatility! napkins, candy, and so much more this is a popular piece for your everyday entertainment! sizing: 8 1/4" x 8 1/4" x 1 1/2" care & use: dishwasher & microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes rectangle
items.description: modern, yet traditional with a pinstripe rim! this platter is absolutely stunning. serve with a nice dinner, assorted charcuterie, or display with a delicious dessert. your guests will be impressed! sizing: 13" x 9" care & use: dishwasher & microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes round cutie container
items.description: it's so cute, you can't live without it! this cutie container fits in every favorite place in your home! sizing: opening is 3″ dia. & entire piece is 5″ x 4″ care & use: dishwasher and microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes salt & pepper shakers
items.description: upgrade your dining table with these revamped salt and pepper shakers – where style meets practicality, and customization meets convenience. it's time to season your meals in style and make every dining experience memorable. sizing: 6.75 x 2.75" x 3" care & use: dishwasher & microwave safe

items.name: pinstripes utensil crock
items.description: if you're trying to stay organized in the kitchen, nora fleming is here to help! this a-nora-ble multipurpose utensil holder is a countertop necessity that can also turn into a vase or a wine cooler! sizing: 4 1/2" x 7 care & use: dishwasher and microwave safe

items.name: plato ovalado gift set
items.description: *this item is excluded from promotional offers and coupon code discounts.* the Anfora set represents a bold new chapter for nora fleming. anchored by the dramatic black finish plato ovalado, this piece redefines our signature aesthetic with depth, contrast, and undeniable sophistication. the rich black backdrop allows each metallic mini to truly shine, creating a look that feels modern, refined, and unforgettable. this special collaboration is made even more meaningful through our partnership with Mexico-based company, Anfora, where each piece is crafted by skilled artisans. their commitment t

items.name: super canister
items.description: in addition to the new minis, nora fleming is also introducing two new multifunctional canisters designed to blend practical storage with the brand’s signature interchangeable style. perfect for storing cookies, candies, coffee pods, baking essentials, or everyday countertop items, the canisters combine practical functionality with nora fleming’s signature interchangeable mini concept, allowing customers to personalize them for seasons, holidays, celebrations, and everyday décor. the super canister and super-duper canister join existing nora fleming medium (3½" dia. x 4½" high) and large (3½"

items.description: in addition to the new minis, nora fleming is also introducing two new multifunctional canisters designed to blend practical storage with the brand’s signature interchangeable style. perfect for storing cookies, candies, coffee pods, baking essentials, or everyday countertop items, the canisters combine practical functionality with nora fleming’s signature interchangeable mini concept, allowing customers to personalize them for seasons, holidays, celebrations, and everyday décor. the super canister and super-duper canister join existing nora fleming medium (3½" dia. x 4½" high) and large (3½"

items.name: triple tier stands—square
items.description: elevate your entertaining with our a-nora-ble nora fleming triple tier stand this stands offer a unique feature – adjustable tiers. you can easily move them to fit your space and create the perfect display. the square stand is designed to hold three stoneware napkin & candy holders. top off your stand with one of our minis to match any occasion or theme. sizing (closed): 13.25" x 14" x 7" sizing (open): 25.5" x 12.5" x 13.25" stoneware napkin & candy holders are sold separately
